## Submission Checklist

Please check every item before submitting. PRs with unchecked items will not be merged.

### Folder & Files
- [ ] Folder is placed inside the correct activity directory (e.g. `cases/2026-03-njupt-winter-camp/`)
- [ ] Folder name follows the format: `teamname-projectslug` (lowercase, hyphens only, **no award prefix**)
- [ ] `README.md` is present and all required fields are filled in **English**
- [ ] `README_ZH.md` is present and all required fields are filled in **Chinese**
- [ ] `requirements.txt` is present (can be empty if no extra dependencies)
- [ ] `main.ipynb` is present (English notebook)
- [ ] `main_zh.ipynb` is present (Chinese notebook)

### Testing
- [ ] I ran all cells in `main.ipynb` top-to-bottom in **aup-learning-cloud Basic GPU Environment** without errors
- [ ] I ran all cells in `main_zh.ipynb` top-to-bottom in **aup-learning-cloud Basic GPU Environment** without errors

### Content
- [ ] No sensitive information included (API keys, passwords, personal data)
- [ ] Total submission size is under 100MB (large files use external links)

### Award Information
- [ ] `Awarded` field in README.md is filled in: `Gold` / `Silver` / `Bronze` / `N/A`
- [ ] I have **NOT** added award prefixes (`01-gold-`, `02-silver-`, `03-bronze-`) to my folder name — the organizer will do this after results are announced

---

**Activity name:** <!-- e.g. 2026 NJUPT Winter Battle -->
**Team name:** <!-- your team name -->
**Project description (1 sentence):** <!-- what does your project do? -->
